message.content:
@startuml
actor DefaultMQProducerImpl
participant Validators
participant MQClientManager
participant MQClientInstance
participant MQClientAPIImpl
participant PullMessageService
participant RebalanceService

note left of DefaultMQProducerImpl: start

activate DefaultMQProducerImpl #red

DefaultMQProducerImpl -> Validators: checkConfig
DefaultMQProducerImpl <.. Validators: result
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> MQClientManager: getInstance
MQClientManager -> MQClientManager: getAndCreateMQClientInstance
MQClientManager -> MQClientInstance **: new
DefaultMQProducerImpl <.. MQClientManager: mQClientFactory: MQClientInstance
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> DefaultMQProducerImpl: registerProducer
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> DefaultMQProducerImpl: start

activate MQClientInstance

DefaultMQProducerImpl -> MQClientInstance: start
MQClientInstance -> MQClientAPIImpl: start
MQClientInstance -> MQClientInstance: startScheduledTask
MQClientInstance -> PullMessageService: start
MQClientInstance -> RebalanceService: start

deactivate MQClientInstance

DefaultMQProducerImpl <-- MQClientInstance: start
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> MQClientInstance: sendHeartbeatToAllBrokerWithLock

note over MQClientInstance: start 结束

@enduml
